name: shomery-web
description: Shomery customer-facing PWA. NotebookLM for your inbox. See CLAUDE.md.

scripts.test:rules: firebase emulators:exec --only firestore,storage --project demo-shomery 'FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts'
scripts.test:e2e:emulators: firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore --project demo-shomery 'NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_FIREBASE_EMULATOR=true NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=demo-shomery playwright test'
scripts.test: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:e2e
scripts.smoke: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:rules && pnpm test:e2e && pnpm build
scripts.smoke:ci: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test:unit && pnpm test:rules && pnpm test:e2e:emulators && pnpm build
